Interface Smoker

All Superinterfaces:
BlockInventoryHolder, BlockState, Container, Furnace, InventoryHolder, Lockable, LockableTileState, Metadatable, Nameable, PersistentDataHolder, PersistentDataViewHolder, TileState, TileStateInventoryHolder
public interface Smoker extends Furnace
Represents a captured state of a smoker.
